result.stdout:
EzDbCodeGen CLI Tool

Usage: ezdbcg [options]

Options:
  -a|--app-name           Application name
  -s|--schema-name        Schema name
  -t|--template           Template file or directory path
  -c|--connection-string  Database connection string
  -v|--verbose            Enable verbose output
  -o|--output             Output directory path
  --save-settings         Save current settings for future use
  --init-config           Initialize a new configuration file
  --test-connection       Test the connection string without running the
                          generator
  --connection-timeout    Connection timeout in seconds for connection testing
  -?|-h|--help            Show help information.
